subject: Databases
title: Views: Saved Queries
description: A quick win: understand Views: Saved Queries.

hook.text: A dashboard query is 50 lines long. Save it as a view and query it like a table.

buildup.text: CREATE VIEW active_users AS SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = 'active'. Now SELECT * FROM active_users.

discovery.text: Views don't store data. They store the query. Every time you query a view, the underlying SQL runs.

twist.text: Materialized views do store data. They cache results and refresh on demand. Fast reads, stale data risk.

climax.text: Views simplify access control. Grant a user access to a view instead of the raw table.

punchline.text: Views: named queries. Materialized views: cached results.

quiz.question: How do views differ from materialized views?
options: Views run the query each time; materialized views cache the result and refresh on demand
Views store data permanently; materialized views are temporary
There is no difference between them
